opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Covered my ruined $800 couch for just $49 — pets can't destroy it now
opportunities.before_state: Couch covered in pet hair, stains, claw marks — embarrassing to have guests over
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, fitted cover hides all damage; couch looks brand new in 5 minutes
buyer_intent_keywords: couch cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Summer shedding season peaks in late May — pet owners are actively desperate for a fix as fur accumulates daily.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia herb stripper and multi-tool kitchen set
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $28 set cut my meal prep from 40 minutes to 15
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered junk drawer, mismatched tools, manually stripping herbs and peeling by hand — chaotic prep counter
opportunities.after_state: Streamlined matching tool set on display, clean counter, prepped ingredients in half the time
opportunities.why_now: Summer entertaining season drives a spike in meal-prep content; kitchen tool Reels are outperforming category averages this month.

opportunities.specific_product: 2-tier pull-out under-sink cabinet organizer with sliding drawer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned my disaster under-sink cabinet into a spa bathroom for $32
opportunities.before_state: Chaos of cleaning bottles, hair tools, and expired products falling out every time the cabinet opens
opportunities.after_state: Fully tiered, pull-out organized system — every product visible, accessible, and neatly contained
opportunities.why_now: Late May bathroom refresh content surges as people prep guest bathrooms for summer visitors — this clip format converts extremely well.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products faux leather folding storage ottoman bench
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $68 ottoman replaced a pile of blankets and gave my living room a real focal point
opportunities.before_state: Messy corner with thrown blankets, no seating, dead wasted floor space in living room
opportunities.after_state: Clean tufted ottoman doubles as seating, coffee table, and hidden storage — room looks intentionally designed
opportunities.why_now: Summer furniture refresh is peaking; Best Choice Products' 15% commission on a $68 ticket makes this a strong revenue play per Reel.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable side sleeper pillow with cutout
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up without neck pain for the first time in years — $72 pillow actually worked
opportunities.before_state: Flat, misshapen stack of regular pillows, waking up stiff with shoulder and neck pain every morning
opportunities.after_state: Ergonomic cutout pillow perfectly cradles head and shoulder — bedroom looks elevated, sleep transformed
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for neck pain side sleeper
opportunities.why_now: Sleep quality content has sustained high engagement into 2026 and Eli & Elm's 20% commission on a $72 price point delivers strong RPM despite slightly lower trend heat.
